output.answer:
The release date of *Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2* is **May 5, 2017**.

<answer>
{"kg": "wikidata", "sparql": "SELECT ?releaseDate WHERE { ?movie wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 ; rdfs:label \"Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2\"@en ; wdt:P577 ?releaseDate . }", "answer": "2017-05-05"}
</answer>
output.formatted:
The release date of *Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2* is **May 5, 2017**.

<answer>
{"kg": "wikidata", "sparql": "SELECT ?releaseDate WHERE { ?movie wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 ; rdfs:label \"Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2\"@en ; wdt:P577 ?releaseDate . }", "answer": "2017-05-05"}
</answer>

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?releaseDate WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 ; rdfs:label "Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2" @en ; wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| releaseDate                         |
| ----------------------------------- |
| 2017-05-05T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
